questions.question: What wire protocol does MCP use for communication between client and server?
What are the two supported MCP transport mechanisms?
What is the first message a client sends during the MCP connection handshake?
Which method does a client call to discover all tools exposed by an MCP server?
Which of the following is a best practice when building MCP servers?

options.A: Accept any input without validation for maximum flexibility
options.B: Return an HTTP 500 status on tool errors
options.C: Return isError: true with a descriptive message rather than crashing
options.D: Use a single tool that handles all operations

questions.question: What problem does MCP primarily solve in the AI ecosystem?

options.A: Reducing the cost of API calls to Claude
options.B: Standardising the interface between AI models and external tools so each tool works with any MCP-compatible client
options.C: Enabling AI models to run without internet access
options.D: Compressing large language models to run on mobile devices

questions.question: In an MCP server, what does the `@app.list_tools()` decorator define?

options.A: The handler that returns the list of tool definitions when the client sends tools/list
options.B: The function that executes a tool when called by the client

questions.question: When an MCP tool call succeeds, what field in the response indicates no error occurred?
What is a 'Resource' in the MCP protocol?

options.A: CPU and memory allocated to the server
options.B: A data source the client can read, such as files, database rows, or API responses
options.C: An API key used for authentication
options.D: A cached version of a previous tool call result

questions.question: In stdio transport mode, how does the MCP client communicate with the server?

options.A: Over HTTP on a configurable port
options.C: By spawning the server as a subprocess and exchanging JSON over stdin/stdout

questions.question: Which Python package provides the MCP server framework?
What is the correct method name to call a tool via MCP's JSON-RPC interface?
Why is the `description` field in an MCP tool definition critically important?

options.A: It sets the access permissions for the tool
options.B: It is what the AI model reads to decide when and how to use the tool
options.C: It defines the return type of the tool
options.D: It sets the tool's execution timeout

questions.question: After the MCP handshake `initialize` exchange, what does the client send to complete the connection setup?
Which security best practice should a file-reading MCP tool enforce?

options.A: Encrypt all file contents before returning them
options.B: Only allow reading within an approved directory scope
options.C: Require OAuth2 authentication for every file read
options.D: Cache all results for 24 hours to reduce disk access
